text:
Sort pkg-plist, trim Makefile header and update to 0.5.4:

0.5.4 (2012-10-12)

    Fix documentation rst errors

0.5.3 (2012-10-12)

    Remove pep8, pyflakes and pyjslint from the depenencies since they are optional
    Make Trac an optional dependency

Fix: See attached patch
